questions: What are ghost ads and how do they measure incrementality?
Why use ghost bids instead of traditional holdouts?
qa.answer: Ghost ads simulate control by identifying users who would have been exposed but were withheld via auction mechanics, enabling causal lift estimation without explicit holdouts in some platforms.
implication: Use ghost ad frameworks where available to estimate incremental lift.
Validate assumptions and compare to geo/user‑level experiments when possible.
Incorporate lift reads into budget allocation and creative decisions.
